map✝ : {X Y : Discrete J✝} → (X ⟶ Y) → (obj✝ X ⟶ obj✝ Y)
map_id✝ : ∀ (X : Discrete J✝), { obj := obj✝, map := map✝ }.map (𝟙 X) = 𝟙 ({ obj := obj✝, map := map✝ }.obj X)
map_comp✝ :

⊢ HasLimit { obj := obj✝, map := map✝, map_id := map_id✝, map_comp := map_comp✝ }

x y : PGame
ox : x.Numeric
oy : y.Numeric
⊢ x < y ↔
